name: productivity-tools
description: Official Todoist MCP access with a selective Google Calendar planning workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Todoist tasks with selective calendar planning.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Todoist's official hosted MCP and adds a workflow that keeps Todoist authoritative for tasks while using Google Calendar only for explicit meetings and time blocks.
defaultPrompt: Use $todoist-task-planning to capture this task with the right deadline and details.
Use $todoist-task-planning to review my Todoist tasks and plan only explicit work blocks on Google Calendar.
